case_title: ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC VS. CHRISTOPHER PINDER ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 200045501) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PINDER, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-10-2022 CONTINUED TO AUG-09-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $278.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210006549) AS TO DEFENDANT PINDER, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-09-2022 CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABSOLUTE RESOLUTIONS INVESTMENTS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINDER, CHRISTOPHER AN INDIVIDUAL $4,193.79 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $278.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,221.79, SEE SCANNED DOC
